note: Blob-frame layout (§17 Blob crypto). A sealed content blob = secretstream header (HEADERBYTES) then, per 4-MiB message, [u32le(cipherLen) then cipher] where cipherLen = plaintextChunk + ABYTES. frameSize = ciphertextSize(plaintextLen) = HEADERBYTES + plaintextLen + chunks*(ABYTES+4); a 0-byte blob still emits one final (empty) message. The per-file key + nonce are random so raw frame bytes are NOT pinned - we pin the deterministic frame SIZE and Padme bucket, plus a live encrypt->decrypt round-trip in the test. The sealed-MANIFEST envelope carries suite=1 and is Padme-padded (secretbox), asserted separately.
